title: ART, GEOMETRY, AND COGNITION · FINAL PROJECT

name: cover-course
text: ART, GEOMETRY, AND COGNITION · FINAL PROJECT
textPreview: ART, GEOMETRY, AND COGNITION · FINAL PROJECT

name: cover-subtitle
text:
How a Painting Changed
the Way I Look at Art
textPreview: How a Painting Changed | the Way I Look at Art

name: cover-method
text: A controlled CNN study of style, geometry, and relational topology
textPreview: A controlled CNN study of style, geometry, and relational topology

name: footer-source-1
text: Image: Diego Velázquez, Las Meninas (1656), Prado; public-domain reproduction via Wikimedia Commons · AI use disclosed in repository
textPreview: Image: Diego Velázquez, Las Meninas (1656), Prado; public-domain reproduction via Wikimedia Commons · AI use disclosed in repository

name: cover-painting
alt: Public-domain reproduction of Diego Velázquez's Las Meninas

name: shift-quote
text:
I began with an image on a screen.

The project forced me to define the position from which the painting looks back.
textPreview: I began with an image on a screen. |  | The project forced me to define the position from which the painting looks back.

name: shift-detail
text: The mirror, painter, canvas, Infanta, and doorway became relations—not a list of objects.
textPreview: The mirror, painter, canvas, Infanta, and doorway became relations—not a list of objects.

name: slide-title-2
text: The painting changed when I stopped treating it as a surface
textPreview: The painting changed when I stopped treating it as a surface

name: footer-source-2
text: Interpretation grounded in this project · Art-historical context: Museo Nacional del Prado
textPreview: Interpretation grounded in this project · Art-historical context: Museo Nacional del Prado

name: shift-original
alt: Las Meninas cropped to foreground figures, mirror, and rear doorway

name: thesis-question
text: How far can a CNN separate style, geometry, and relational topology in Las Meninas?
textPreview: How far can a CNN separate style, geometry, and relational topology in Las Meninas?

name: thesis-copy
text: The CNN is useful precisely as an incomplete viewer: it measures visual change, then exposes the relations its distances do not explain.
textPreview: The CNN is useful precisely as an incomplete viewer: it measures visual change, then exposes the relations its distances do not explain.

name: footer-source-3
text: Project research question and thesis · No human-participant study was conducted
textPreview: Project research question and thesis · No human-participant study was conducted

name: slide-title-4
text: One painting can be tested at three different layers
textPreview: One painting can be tested at three different layers

name: framework-style-copy
text:
Color · texture · local mark

VGG19 Gram matrices summarize channel co-activation while weakening exact position.
textPreview: Color · texture · local mark |  | VGG19 Gram matrices summarize channel co-activation while weakening exact position.

name: framework-style-test
text: Test: Does appearance change while composition remains recognizable?
textPreview: Test: Does appearance change while composition remains recognizable?

name: framework-geometry-copy
text:
Coordinate · scale · angle

Spatial VGG maps, HED boundaries, Hough segments, and RANSAC test layout and convergence.
textPreview: Coordinate · scale · angle |  | Spatial VGG maps, HED boundaries, Hough segments, and RANSAC test layout and convergence.

name: framework-geometry-test
text: Test: Does structure move when texture is comparatively stable?
textPreview: Test: Does structure move when texture is comparatively stable?

name: framework-topology-copy
text:
Reflects · contains · occludes

Five qualitative relations are declared, edited, and manually audited—not inferred by VGG.
textPreview: Reflects · contains · occludes |  | Five qualitative relations are declared, edited, and manually audited—not inferred by VGG.

name: framework-topology-test
text: Test: Can meaning change while CNN distance stays small?
textPreview: Test: Can meaning change while CNN distance stays small?

name: footer-source-4
text: Project definitions · “Relational topology” is an operational scene graph, not a brain measurement
textPreview: Project definitions · “Relational topology” is an operational scene graph, not a brain measurement

name: slide-title-5
text: A 2 × 2 design separates style from geometry
textPreview: A 2 × 2 design separates style from geometry

name: matrix-trajectories
text: Five registered intensities—0, 25, 50, 75, 100%—turn each endpoint into a trajectory.
textPreview: Five registered intensities—0, 25, 50, 75, 100%—turn each endpoint into a trajectory.

name: footer-source-5
text: Project-generated matrix · Same 1,779 × 2,048 working proxy and frozen preprocessing across conditions
textPreview: Project-generated matrix · Same 1,779 × 2,048 working proxy and frozen preprocessing across conditions

name: matrix-figure
alt: Controlled neural transformation matrix crossing geometry and style

name: slide-title-6
text: The neural networks are instruments inside a larger measurement chain
textPreview: The neural networks are instruments inside a larger measurement chain

name: method-copy-2
text:
Gram correlations → style
Spatial feature maps → layout
Frozen ImageNet-1K weights
textPreview: Gram correlations → style | Spatial feature maps → layout | Frozen ImageNet-1K weights

name: method-copy-3
text:
HED probability → threshold
Hough line segments
RANSAC intersection candidate
textPreview: HED probability → threshold | Hough line segments | RANSAC intersection candidate

name: method-copy-4
text:
Five relations
Manual check
No observer sample
textPreview: Five relations | Manual check | No observer sample

name: method-note-copy
text: CNN output is never labeled “understanding”: VGG measures representational distance; HED measures boundary probability.
textPreview: CNN output is never labeled “understanding”: VGG measures representational distance; HED measures boundary probability.

name: footer-source-6
text: Methods: Simonyan & Zisserman (VGG19); Gatys et al. (Gram style); Xie & Tu (HED); OpenCV Hough
textPreview: Methods: Simonyan & Zisserman (VGG19); Gatys et al. (Gram style); Xie & Tu (HED); OpenCV Hough

name: slide-title-7
text: Deep layers trade crisp edges for coarse scene structure
textPreview: Deep layers trade crisp edges for coarse scene structure

name: activation-shallow-copy
text: Frames, seams, faces, and dress boundaries remain locally sharp.
textPreview: Frames, seams, faces, and dress boundaries remain locally sharp.

name: activation-deep-copy
text: Spatial detail pools into broad figure and doorway responses—but relations are still not explicit edges in a graph.
textPreview: Spatial detail pools into broad figure and doorway responses—but relations are still not explicit edges in a graph.

name: footer-source-7
text: Project visualization of frozen Torchvision VGG19 activations · Heatmaps show channel-mean activation energy
textPreview: Project visualization of frozen Torchvision VGG19 activations · Heatmaps show channel-mean activation energy

alt: VGG19 activation energy from CNN input through relu5_1

name: slide-title-8
text: The controls separate direction in feature space—not perfectly, but clearly
textPreview: The controls separate direction in feature space—not perfectly, but clearly

name: trajectory-meaning
text: Style changes mostly along the Gram axis; geometry changes dominate the spatial axis.
textPreview: Style changes mostly along the Gram axis; geometry changes dominate the spatial axis.

name: footer-source-8
text: Raw VGG19 aggregate distances from identical 0% baseline · Style and spatial metrics are not merged into one score
textPreview: Raw VGG19 aggregate distances from identical 0% baseline · Style and spatial metrics are not merged into one score

name: slide-title-11
text: Deleting one tiny mirror relation barely moves VGG

name: topology-conclusion
text: The larger semantic loss does not receive the larger style distance.
textPreview: The larger semantic loss does not receive the larger style distance.

name: footer-source-11
text: Manual audit of five predefined relations (one author) + frozen VGG19 distances · Descriptive case study, not an inferential test
textPreview: Manual audit of five predefined relations (one author) + frozen VGG19 distances · Descriptive case study, not an inferential test

name: topology-graph

name: slide-title-12
text: HED finds edges; vanishing-point candidates follow the crop
textPreview: HED finds edges; vanishing-point candidates follow the crop

name: roi-bottom-line
text: Changing the analyst's window changes the candidate: this pipeline does not discover one stable historical vanishing point.
textPreview: Changing the analyst's window changes the candidate: this pipeline does not discover one stable historical vanishing point.

name: footer-source-12
text: HED → HoughLinesP → 5,000-iteration RANSAC · Coordinates normalized to each full working image · Human validation required

name: closing-title
text:
The CNN helped me see more clearly
by showing me what it could not see.
textPreview: The CNN helped me see more clearly | by showing me what it could not see.

name: closing-finding-1-copy
text: Style and geometry followed different VGG trajectories.
textPreview: Style and geometry followed different VGG trajectories.

name: closing-finding-2-copy
text: Mirror deletion broke a declared relation while CNN distances stayed tiny.
textPreview: Mirror deletion broke a declared relation while CNN distances stayed tiny.

name: closing-finding-3-copy
text: HED extracted edges, but a stable vanishing point did not survive ROI changes.
textPreview: HED extracted edges, but a stable vanishing point did not survive ROI changes.

name: closing-limit-copy
text: One painting · frozen pretrained models · five manually defined relations · one author · no human participants · no inferential statistics
textPreview: One painting · frozen pretrained models · five manually defined relations · one author · no human participants · no inferential statistics
